description_long: This object is a large, built-in shelving or cabinet structure with a complex, multi-room interior layout. The exterior is primarily gray, with interior walls and partitions in a muted orange-brown color. The main section features a stepped, tiered arrangement of blue seats, reminiscent of an auditorium or lecture hall, with a curved front wall. The side compartments are separated by solid partitions and appear to be smaller rooms or storage areas. The structure is elevated on short supports, with visible underfloor space. The overall design suggests a specialized, institutional cabinet or shelving unit, possibly for public or communal use.
description: A large, built-in cabinet or shelving unit with gray exterior, orange-brown interior partitions, and a stepped blue seating area, resembling an auditorium layout.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid gray exterior wall and the orange-brown partitioned rooms on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the orange-brown back wall and the depth of the structure.
description_view_2: Cutaway side view revealing the blue tiered seating, interior partitions, and underfloor space.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the curved gray wall and the full arrangement of blue seats inside.
